sections.company_snapshot: Cactus is a company focused on developing AI infrastructure for smartphones, aiming to leverage the increasing computational power of mobile devices to enable on-device AI processing [claim:3ce27cf5-2c4f-59a2-94e3-0bf497e02712].
investment_hypotheses: The successful Show HN launch indicates strong initial interest and community engagement, suggesting potential for viral growth [claim:ebcb7311-e382-5f71-86b8-330cd8af4e76].

The public release of the product on GitHub demonstrates technical capability and a commitment to transparency, which are positive indicators for future development and adoption [claim:3ce27cf5-2c4f-59a2-94e3-0bf497e02712].

strengths: Strong initial traction with the Show HN launch, indicating community interest [claim:ebcb7311-e382-5f71-86b8-330cd8af4e76].
Technical capability demonstrated by the public release of the product on GitHub [claim:3ce27cf5-2c4f-59a2-94e3-0bf497e02712].
weaknesses: Lack of a public track record or previous entrepreneurial experience by the founder limits credibility and investor confidence.
opportunities: Emerging market for AI infrastructure on smartphones as mobile devices become more powerful.
threats: Competitive landscape for AI on smartphones is not fully defined, posing potential risks from new entrants or existing tech giants.

sections.problem_product: Cactus addresses the problem of centralized AI processing by providing infrastructure that enables AI tasks to be processed directly on smartphones, reducing latency and dependency on cloud services [claim:3ce27cf5-2c4f-59a2-94e3-0bf497e02712].
sections.traction_kpis: The Show HN launch achieved 231 points and 82 comments, indicating significant community interest and engagement [claim:ebcb7311-e382-5f71-86b8-330cd8af4e76].

what_would_change_my_mind: Disclosure of financial projections and a detailed go-to-market strategy.
